---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear content in README / docs / javadoc
title: "[docs] "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

## Location
<!-- Which README section / docs/<file>.md / javadoc class. URL + line is ideal. -->

## Issue type
- [ ] Missing (information that should be there is not)
- [ ] Incorrect (does not match actual behavior)
- [ ] Unclear (open to multiple interpretations)
- [ ] Out of date (does not reflect current code)
- [ ] Sample code does not compile / run

## Current content
<!-- Quote the problematic passage or paste the relevant excerpt. -->

## Suggested change
<!-- How it should read. A patch-style diff is welcome. -->
